name: planning
description: Stress-test plans while preserving their decisions and handoffs.

interface.shortDescription: Grilling interviews with durable decisions and handoffs.
interface.longDescription: Stress-test an idea one decision at a time, keep the session and project knowledge documented, and hand the work off cleanly when needed.
defaultPrompt: Grill this plan with me and keep the decisions documented.
Create a handoff for the next session.
